zh.lifeSummary: 當Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III於1075年6月9日出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 居特斯洛素-海德時，他的父親Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg36歲，母親Hedwig von Formbach26歲。他於1106年與Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1137年12月3日在奧地利提洛爾雷特布特望享年62歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 爾茲包格爾姆斯塔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III于1075年6月9日出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 居特斯洛素-海德时，他的父亲Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg36岁，母亲Hedwig von Formbach26岁。他于1106年与Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1137年12月3日在奥地利提洛爾雷特布特望享年62岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 爾茲包格爾姆斯塔特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Herzog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Heinz, Kurt, Otto, Wolfgang, Franz, Arno, Ernst, Hildegarde, Reinhold.

German: from the Middle High German title of nobility herzoge ‘duke’ (Old High German herizoho, from heri ‘army’ + ziohan ‘to lead’, a calque of the Byzantine title stratēlatēs ‘general, commander’, from Greek stratos ‘army’ + elaunein ‘to lead’). The name is unlikely to refer to descent from an actual duke; it is normally an occupational name for the servant of a duke or a nickname for one who put on the airs and graces of a duke. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia (see also 3 below). Compare Hertzog .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Herzog ‘duke’ (see 1 above). Compare Graf and Kaiser .

variants.name: Hartsook
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog  .

variants.name: Herceg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Croatian Stanko.

Croatian: nickname from herceg ‘duke’, a title of the medieval feudal lords of Herzegovina (‘duke's land’, a region in Bosnia and Herzegovina), derived from the Hungarian form of German Herzog . Compare Erceg .

variants.name: Herczeg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Imre, Laszlo, Tibor, Attila, Ferenc, Gaza, Istvan, Janos.
Hungarian form of German   Herzog  .

variants.name: Herzig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Fritzi, Hans, Horst, Markus, Monika.
German (eastern and central Germany and Silesia, Switzerland): variant of   Herzog  .
German: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed with hard ‘strong, hardy’, for instance Herto.

variants.name: Hertzog
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Herzog and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Hertzog is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Hartzog
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog   1.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsock
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsoe
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsough
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog  .

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably from a placename Sachenbach in southern Germany, the first part of which is from Old High German saher ‘reed grass’ or ‘swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Lothar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + hari ‘army’; a Frankish royal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III was born on 9 June 1075, in Sud-Heide, Gütersloh, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, was 36 and his mother, Hedwig von Formbach, was 26. He married Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim in 1106, in Der, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 3 December 1137, in Breitenwang, Reutte, Tirol, Austria, at the age of 62, and was buried in Helmstadt, Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III est né le 9 juin 1075, à Sud-Heide, Kreis Gütersloh, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Formbach, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim en 1106, à Der, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1137, à Breitenwang, Reutte, Tirol, Autriche, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Helmstadt, Landkreis Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III am 9. Juni 1075 in Sud-Heide, Kreis Gütersloh, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg 36 und seine Mutter Hedwig von Formbach 26. Er hat 1106 in Der, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1137 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Breitenwang, Reutte, Tirol, Österreich und wurde in Helmstadt, Landkreis Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III è nato il il 9 giugno 1075 nel Sud-Heide, Kreis Gütersloh, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Hedwig von Formbach, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim nel 1106, nel Der, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 3 dicembre 1137, nel Breitenwang, Reutte, Tirolo, Austria, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Helmstadt, Landkreis Würzburg, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen IIIが1075年6月9日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス グuテルスロスド-ヘイドで生まれた時，父Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburgは36歳，母Hedwig von Formbachは26歳であった。1106年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベダーでPrinzessin Richenza von Northeimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1137年12月3日にオーストリアティロルレウットブレイテンワンで62歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ウuルズブルグヘルムスタトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III(이)가 1075년 6월 9일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 그u터슬로 수드-헤이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig von Formbach(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1106년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 데르에서 Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1137년 12월 3일 오스트리아 티럴 레우트 브레이텐왕에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 wu르즈버그 헬스타드트에 묻혔다.

mn.9 June 1075–3 December 1137: 1075 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 9–1137 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 3

pt.9 June 1075–3 December 1137: 9 de junho de 1075–3 de dezembro de 1137
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III nasceu em 9 de junho de 1075, em Sud-Heide, Kreis Gütersloh, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Formbach, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim em 1106, em Der, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1137, em Breitenwang, Reutte, Tirol, Áustria, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Helmstadt, Landkreis Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III родился 9 июня 1075 г. в местности суд-хид, крис гuтирслох, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Formbach, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim в 1106 г. в местности дир, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 3 декабря 1137 г. в местности бритенванг, реутт, тирол, Австрия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хелмстадт, ландкрис вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия.

sm.Between 1133 and 1137: mai le 1133 e o'o I le 1137

es.9 June 1075–3 December 1137: 9 de junio de 1075–3 de diciembre de 1137
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lothar von Süplingenburg Herzog von Sachsen III nació el 9 de junio de 1075, en Sud-Heide, Kreis Gütersloh, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard Gebhard von Supplingenburg, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Formbach, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Prinzessin Richenza von Northeim en 1106, en Der, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1137, en Breitenwang, Reutte, Tirol, Austria, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Helmstadt, Landkreis Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania.
